creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin


News in 1.9.1, 2020-10-10 [1]
-------------------------
* gspell_language_get_name() is now implemented with the ICU library, not with
  the iso-codes package. As a result, gspell no longer depends on the
  iso-codes, and has the ICU as a new dependency.
* Translation updates.

I don't see the dependency change reflected in the diff -- could you follow up on that?


mfg Tobias

[1] https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gspell/blob/master/NEWS
